film.title: Who's Your Daddy?
film.overview: An adopted Ohio high school senior discovers he is the inherited heir to a porn empire. Dropped into a bitter power struggle, his new flock of beautiful co-workers come to his aid.

dialogues.dialogue: Did you hear that?  My boy is a doctor.  You're a doctor, son. Proud of you!  - Thanks! - I've got a doctor in my family.  Go deep, Pete! Deep, deep!

- I'd really rather not. - Peter, come on!  Summer's over, you ready for the fall?  Don't be prideful. Come on, just... I'm not being prideful.  I'm not being prideful.  It's hard to apologize when I just got shoved off a porch.
Summer's over, you ready for the fall?  Don't be prideful. Come on, just... I'm not being prideful.  I'm not being prideful.  It's hard to apologize when I just got shoved off a porch.  Charged up!
